title: 荣誉附件正文｜LOA Combine（第9部分）
content:

Visa application is claimable, if it is required to fulfil the travel. Travel insurance for matriculated SUTD students is claimable. PIs and / or his / her research staff hired under the grant are required to submit the travel request form to TL office at least 4 weeks prior to the actual travel date via K2 system. Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 4 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: April 2018 Type of Description Expenses TL Travel Request Approval PIs can approve their research staff’s travel requests up to S$5,000. Any amount above S$5,000 will be routed to TL Director for approval • Requests by Research Staff (up to S$5,000) approval by PI Completed request form PI approves (according to TL guidelines) to TL office for checking and record keeping (4 weeks before travel date) booking and reservation of travel All PIs’ travel requests are to be approved by TL Director. • Requests by PIs and Research Staff (above S$5,000) approval by TL Director Completed request form PI supports (only for researchers’ requests of amount above S$5,000) TL Office for clearance (4 weeks before travel date) TL Director approval booking and reservation of travel PIs and research staff are required to complete the request form (hardcopy TL Travel Request Form for Students and online TL Travel Request Form for PIs), justify the need to travel and submit any relevant documents to support the request. PIs are to ensure that there are sufficient funds to support the travel. No virement of budget into this vote is allowed. PIs and research staff are to proceed with bookings and reservations only after approval is granted. Should the actual expenditures exceed the approved sum, PIs and research staff can only claim up to the approved amount for the approved travel dates and self-fund the excess. The PIs must submit a copy of the approved Travel Request Form, conference trip report (including lessons learnt and recommendations) and other supporting documents stated on the form within 2 weeks upon return when claiming reimbursement of the expenses. Outbound travel and conference attendance fees for PIs and researchers to be funded by the Conference Travel vote. Per diem is capped at S$2,000 per month for trips exceeding 21 days. Failure to comply with any of the requirements may result in the claims being rejected. The management reserves the right to recover any disbursed claim from the claimant, including air tickets purchased through the appointed travel agencies. Please refer to the University’s policy on business travel in SUTD Central under Office of Human Resources (HR). Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 5 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: April 2018 Type of Description Expenses Local Allowable Conferences (strictly for For PIs and his / her research staff hired under the grant and matriculated conference only) SUTD students, if the local conference is directly relevant to the research that the grant intended to support and contributes to meeting the deliverables. PIs are to ensure that there are sufficient funds to support the conference. No virement of budget to this vote is allowed.
